name: My Cozy Home
author: Poki
description: My Cozy Home is a decoration game where your dream house is just a few taps away! Plan your perfect layout, choose where to place your bedroom, living room, bathroom, and more. Pick your favorite furniture, decorate every corner just how you like it, and expand your home as your imagination grows. Ready to create the coziest home ever? How to play My Cozy Home? Click to select an item. Drag the items to the desired location. Who created My Cozy Home? My Cozy Home is created by WeLoPlay. Play their other games on Poki: Anime Dress Up , Star Blogger: Left or Right , Fruit Wheel , Glam Girl: Dress Up and Makeover , Hockey Stars , Nails DIY: Manicure Master , Stickman Bike , Stickman Race , Tag , Tag 2 , and wall-jumper! How can I play My Cozy Home for free? You can play My Cozy Home for free on Poki. Can I play My Cozy Home on mobile devices and desktop? My Cozy Home can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
